article.body_preview:
RANGPUR, Feb 10, 2023 (BSS) - Braving recent cold waves, farmers have already completed transplantation of Boro rice seedlings on 72 percent of the targeted land area in Rangpur agriculture region.

Officials of the Department of Agricultural Extension (DAE) said tender plants of Boro rice are growing well across the region where transplantation of seedlings continues in full swing during the current Rabi season.

The DAE and other agri-related organizations are providing latest technologies to

llm_connections.evidence_quote: are ensuring smooth supply of fertilizers and electricity to farmers
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly describes organizations 'ensuring smooth supply of fertilizers', which directly refers to regional logistics/supply performance consistent with the Delivery feature's scope.
